ext.description: Right-click an image to redact sensitive regions before sharing — drag rectangles, apply blur / pixelate / solid block. Multi-region accumulating, output is always PNG saved next to the source as <name>-<YYMMDDHHMMSS>.png.

runtime.Drag a rectangle to add a redaction. Esc: Drag a rectangle to add a redaction. Esc to cancel current drag.
runtime.No regions yet — drag on the image to ad: No regions yet — drag on the image to add one.
